message:
fix: sling env var and flag mutations are now scoped locally

os.Setenv BD_DOLT_AUTO_COMMIT was never restored after sling completed.
slingForce package-level flag was mutated in-place by auto-force logic.
Both are process-wide side effects. Now uses defer to restore env and
a local force variable to avoid mutating the cobra flag.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
